title: Schwarzschild Metric Killing Vectors
desc: Proving time and angular Killing vectors in Schwarzschild spacetime.

title: General Relativity Homework 5 Solutions
desc: Calculating Christoffel symbols and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent metric.

title: Advanced LIGO Noise Sources and Quantum Noise
desc: Analyzes quantum, thermal, seismic, and gas noise in Advanced LIGO interferometers, detailing their impact on gravitational wave detection.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs on operator properties and uncertainty relations in quantum mechanics.

title: Statistical Mechanics: Particle Distributions and Quantum States
desc: Calculates most probable distributions for classical, bosonic, and fermionic particles, linking β to temperature.

title: Solving Physics Integrals and Tensor Proofs
desc: Step-by-step solutions for quantum field theory and electromagnetism exercises.

title: Proving Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Demonstrates Lorentz invariance of inner products and derives optical theorem from S-matrix unitarity.

title: Scattering Theory Principles and Axioms
desc: Explores scattering amplitude constraints, Hilbert space axioms, and asymptotic states in quantum theory.

title: On-Shell Factorization in Quantum Field Theory
desc: Explores Green functions, poles, and factorization in scattering amplitudes.

title: Spinor Helicity Formalism in Physics
desc: Exploring massless amplitudes and spinor representations in quantum field theory.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework: Normalization and Particle Classification
desc: Normalizing a probability distribution and classifying particles as bosons or fermions based on spin.

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Explores Taylor's Theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms for function approximation.

title: Advanced Calculus Series Convergence Analysis
desc: Analyzing convergence of six infinite series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus Surface and Curve Integrals
desc: Solutions for surface integrals on a plane disk and curve integrals using parameterization.

title: Power Series Convergence and Summation Formulas
desc: Analyzing convergence domains and proving summation formulas for power series like ln(1+x) and arctan(x).

title: Advanced Calculus: Metrics and Inequalities
desc: Proving metric properties and Cauchy-Schwarz inequality in function spaces.

title: Advanced Calculus: Existence of Extrema
desc: Proving existence of minima and maxima for continuous functions on Euclidean spaces.

title: Advanced Calculus Partial Derivative Exercises
desc: A collection of partial derivative problems with solutions in advanced calculus.

title: Implicit Function Theorem Application in Calculus
desc: Analyzing a cubic equation to prove implicit function existence and compute derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Critical Points Analysis
desc: Finding and classifying critical points of multivariable functions using partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Integration Problems
desc: Solving area and volume integrals using coordinate transformations and Jacobians.

title: Advanced Calculus: Surface Area and Centroids
desc: Deriving surface area formulas for ellipsoids and tori, and calculating centroids.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Proofs and Trigonometric Identities
desc: A complex analysis assignment proving a modulus identity and deriving multiple-angle trigonometric formulas.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Calculating integrals using the residue theorem with detailed step-by-step solutions.

title: Complex Analysis: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Using residue theorem to evaluate improper integrals with branch cuts and poles.

title: Complex Function Homework: Trigonometric Identities
desc: Proofs for complex sine/cosine addition formulas and hyperbolic identities.

title: Analyzing Multivalued Functions and Branch Points
desc: A technical analysis of multivalued complex functions, their branch points, and path-dependent evaluations.

title: Complex Analysis Homework Solutions
desc: Solutions for contour integrals and function analysis in complex variables.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Series Convergence Tests
desc: Analyzing convergence of positive and complex series with counterexamples.

title: Complex Analysis Homework on Series Convergence
desc: Analyzing convergence radii, sum functions, and Fourier series in complex analysis problems.
